compatibilityShell.role: Legacy InteractiveMode host shell with fields, accessors, and wrapper registry installation.
compatibilityShell.rustRewriteStrategy: Keep as JS shim until renderer, event runtime, stores, and shell executor are replaced.

modules.name: shell-executor
modules.role: Command execution and process line streaming.

modules.name: patch-engine
modules.role: Terminal frame diff planning and patch writing.

modules.name: tui-renderer
modules.role: Renderer facade, view state, and TUI event protocol.

modules.name: event-state-runtime
modules.role: Event dispatch, state machine, effect command protocol, and host side-effect boundary.

modules.name: session-store
modules.role: Agent session facade and settings/session bridge.

modules.name: transcript-store
modules.role: Transcript rendering and streaming assistant ownership.

modules.name: search-indexer
modules.role: Search query construction, process execution, result formatting, and context extraction.

modules.name: queue-store
modules.role: Queued user messages and compaction steering queue.

modules.name: notice-store
modules.role: Warnings, package update notices, and version notices.

modules.name: bash-store
modules.role: Bash command UI state and pending bash component ownership.

modules.name: tool-flow-store
modules.role: Tool flow aggregation, pending tool map, and Claude-style compact tool summaries.

modules.name: ui-state-store
modules.role: Working loader, response loader, thinking/status line state.

modules.name: interactive-mode-support
modules.role: Compatibility controllers, adapters, wrappers, formatting helpers, and bootstrap/lifecycle glue.

wrapperRegistry.role: Installs legacy InteractiveMode methods onto the prototype while real logic lives in modules.
